local_classifier_baselines.role: preferred Australasian legal encoder baseline for argument and stance classifiers
local_classifier_baselines.notes: Evaluate before defaulting to nlpaueb/legal-bert-base-uncased because the source domain is closer to NZ legal text.
Keep as a reproducible comparator, not as the assumed best local model.

silver_label_adjudicators.role: local or self-hosted legal LLM adjudicator for silver-label disagreement queues
silver_label_adjudicators.notes: Use for argument/stance labelling prompts when hardware and licensing checks pass; do not count outputs as gold labels.

silver_label_adjudicators.role: Australasian legal generative model candidate for silver labelling and adjudication
silver_label_adjudicators.notes: Use as a legal-domain provider candidate, with privacy and terms review before live corpus use.

retrieval_and_linking_candidates.role: retrieval, RAG, and semantic linking evaluation
retrieval_and_linking_candidates.notes: Treat as API or air-gapped evaluation until open local weights are available.

model_recommendations.follow_up_issue: Revisit after NZ-legislation fine-tuning to compare NZ-adapted encoders, local legal LLM adjudicators, and frontier-model silver labelling.

acceptance.human_calibration_override: Two independent AI votes plus one human-labelled calibration-source match can satisfy the silver gate.
acceptance.gold_label_warning: Outputs from this plan are silver labels only and must not be represented as human gold labels.
